name: Memory Router
description: Unified memory search across vector (LanceDB), file (MEMORY.md), and wiki memory sources. Provides a single search interface that fans out to all memory backends and merges/ranks results.

defaultSources.description: Default memory sources to search when none specified.

maxTotalResults.description: Maximum total results returned across all sources.

deduplicateThreshold.description: Similarity threshold for deduplication (1.0 = exact match only).

enabled.label: Enable Memory Router
enabled.help: Provide a unified memory search interface across all memory backends.

defaultSources.label: Default Search Sources
defaultSources.help: Which memory sources to search by default.
